task_completion.description: Agent searched for the target patient.

task_completion.description: Agent opened the patient chart for Dwana West.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The patient dashboard or chart is open, displaying the name 'Dwana West' and DOB '1986-03-30' (or equivalent format like 30-Mar-1986).

task_completion.description: Agent navigated to the active visit details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An 'Active Visit' section, badge, or visit dashboard is visible on the patient's chart.

task_completion.description: Agent clicked the option to end the visit.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A confirmation modal, dialog, or prompt asking to confirm ending the visit is visible on screen.

task_completion.description: The active visit was successfully ended.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success toast notification appears, the visit status changes to 'Past Visit', or the 'Active Visit' indicator is no longer present on the patient's dashboard.

integrity.description: Agent used the OpenMRS graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the OpenMRS SPA, not a terminal or API client.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the correct patient record.
integrity.visual_evidence: The name 'Dwana West' is clearly visible in the patient header during the visit ending process.

integrity.description: The visit ending appears to be a genuine UI interaction.
integrity.visual_evidence: The transition from active to ended visit is shown through standard OpenMRS UI elements (buttons, modals, toasts) rather than text editor manipulation.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target patient is Dwana West, DOB: 1986-03-30. Note that OpenMRS may display the DOB in formats like '30-Mar-1986'. The patient must be exactly this individual.
